channel.title: GLSL on Chuck
channel.description: Recent content in GLSL on Chuck

item.title: OpenGL Graphics Pipeline
item.author: chuckxcp@qq.com (Chuck)
item.description: The OpenGL graphics pipeline is a sequence of processing steps that converts 3D vertex coordinates and data into a 2D colored image on your screen. It handles everything from transforming 3D models and applying lighting to rasterizing shapes and calculating individual pixel colors.
